evals.prompt: How should I organize packages in a large Go project?
evals.expected_output: Follow standard layout: cmd/, internal/, pkg/. Organize by domain/feature, not by layer. Avoid controllers/, services/ at root. Use Clean Architecture layers.

evals.prompt: How do I wire dependencies in a Go app without global singletons?
evals.expected_output: Use explicit constructor injection: NewService(repo Repository) *Service. Wire everything in main.go. Define interfaces at the consumer side.

evals.prompt: How do I prevent my domain layer from depending on the database layer?
evals.expected_output: Define Repository interfaces in the domain/port layer. Infrastructure implements them. Domain never imports from infrastructure. Inversion of Control.

assertions.description: Mentions inversion of control or dependency inversion

should_not_trigger: How do I use goroutines safely?
What is the Go error handling pattern?
How do I create a React component?
